headline: T-Mobile is booting customers from its oldest plans
summary: T-Mobile is retiring many legacy plans, impacting 3G-era subscribers. Customers are being moved to current rate plans, causing user dissatisfaction. Screenshots of the notifications are being shared on Reddit.

headline: After a great start, DC’s new cinematic universe is already slowing down
summary: DC's new cinematic universe, despite a strong start, faces slowdown concerns. A standalone Supergirl feature after Superman seems questionable to many. Warner Bros. Discovery's plans to fast-track another Kryptonian film raises eyebrows.

headline: Leaked iPhone 18 Pro photos reportedly wound up on the dark web
summary: iPhone 18 Pro images and parts lists leaked onto the dark web. A data breach at an Apple supplier is cited as the cause. Leaks show a three-camera layout and Apple logo on the alleged iPhone 18 Pro.

headline: Tidal won’t pay royalties on AI-generated music but isn’t banning it outright
summary: Tidal will no longer monetize 100% AI-generated music, effective immediately. Starting July 15th, identified AI tracks will receive a special label. The platform aims to protect artists while not outright banning AI-created content.

headline: Persona Live-Action TV Show in the Works at Netflix
summary: A live-action TV series based on the Persona franchise is reportedly in development. Netflix is the streaming platform rumored to be producing the show. This marks a significant move for the popular RPG series.

headline: Cyberpunk: Edgerunners 2 Teaser Features Cyberpunk 2077 Locations Set to Show Up in New Season
summary: The first teaser for Cyberpunk: Edgerunners 2 has been released. Fans have identified locations from Cyberpunk 2077 in the teaser. The new season promises to incorporate familiar settings from the game.

headline: The 10 Most Anticipated TV Shows to Stream in July
summary: A list of the top 10 most anticipated TV shows launching in July has been released. Selections include diverse genres, from superhero sagas to dramatic narratives. Discover what's hot to stream this month across various platforms.

headline: Why The Back-to-Back Street Fighter 6 Evo Champion, MenaRD, Switched Off His Main in the Finals
summary: Evo Champion MenaRD notably changed his main character during the Street Fighter 6 finals. We investigate the strategic reasons behind this high-stakes decision. Learn about the surprising character switch from the two-time champion.

headline: Long-delayed defence spending plan to be published on Tuesday, with focus on drone warfare
summary: The UK's long-awaited defence investment plan is set for publication on Tuesday. It will detail how billions will be allocated to equip the UK Armed Forces. A key focus of the plan is expected to be drone warfare capabilities.

headline: New 'No 10 North' plan will rebalance power in Britain, Burnham promises
summary: Andy Burnham proposes a 'No 10 North' plan to rebalance power across Britain. His devolution strategy aims to drive economic growth in every postcode. This initiative seeks to decentralize governance and empower local regions.

headline: Will Andy Burnham's devolution plan raise economic growth?
summary: BBC Verify examines the potential economic impact of Andy Burnham's devolution plan. The analysis explores whether further devolution could boost UK growth. Experts weigh in on the anticipated effects of decentralizing power.

headline: Refugees will be told to repay around £10,000 under new asylum rules
summary: New asylum laws will grant ministers powers to recover costs from adult asylum seekers. Refugees could be asked to repay approximately £10,000 for support received. This policy aims to recoup expenses related to asylum accommodation and aid.
